Package org.apache.juneau.marshall.swaps

package org.apache.juneau.marshall.swaps
Predefined Swaps
  • Related Packages
    Package
    Description
    org.apache.juneau.marshall
    Marshalling API
  • Classes
    Class
    Description
    BinarySwap
    Thin delegating swap for top-level byte[] values in textual serializers.
    ClassFormatSwap
    Thin delegating swap for Class values driven by the context-configured ClassFormat.
    DefaultingTemporalAccessor
    Wraps a TemporalAccessor to provide default values wherever possible instead of throwing unsupported field exceptions.
    InputStreamSwap
    Transforms InputStreams to Strings.
    InputStreamSwap.Base64
    Converts InputStreams to BASE-64 encoding.
    InputStreamSwap.Hex
    Converts InputStreams to hex encoding.
    InputStreamSwap.SpacedHex
    Converts InputStreams to spaced-hex encoding.
    MarshallingStringSwap<T>
    Transforms beans into Strings by simply calling the Object.toString() method.
    MatchResultSwap
    Transforms MatchResults to List objects.
    ParsedReaderSwap
    Transforms the contents of a Reader into an Object.
    ParsedReaderSwap.Html
    Reader transform for reading HTML text.
    ParsedReaderSwap.Json
    Reader transform for reading JSON text.
    ParsedReaderSwap.PlainText
    Reader transform for reading plain text.
    ParsedReaderSwap.Uon
    Reader transform for reading plain text.
    ParsedReaderSwap.UrlEncoding
    Reader transform for reading plain text.
    ParsedReaderSwap.Xml
    Reader transform for reading XML text.
    ReaderSwap
    Transforms Readers to Strings.
    StackTraceElementSwap
    Transforms StackTraceElements to String objects.
    StringFormatSwap
    Built-in object swap implementation class for the @MarshalledProp(format) annotation.
    UrlSwap
    Transforms URL objects to and from Strings.
